CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Completed"), IF( Actual_Completion_Date__c > Estimated_End_Date__c, "Completed, but delayed by " & TEXT(Actual_Completion_Date__c - Estimated_End_Date__c) & " days", "Completed on time" ), IF( Estimated_End_Date__c >= TODAY(), TEXT(Estimated_End_Date__c - TODAY()) & " days left", TEXT(TODAY() - Estimated_End_Date__c) & " days overdue" ) )
CustomField.label: Project Timeline Status
